calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Feb-14-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jennifer Marlowe appeared by zoom for Marc Fariss (Petitioner).
Andrew Dosa appeared by zoom for Deborah Bridge.
Mark Vaughn appeared by courtcall for Hartford Insurance Company.

Mr. Dosa stated that his client has authorized and instructed him to withdraw her opposition, that they don't have an opposition to the petition and encouraged the court to consider it as it appears to be appropriate. There being no other oppositions, the Petition for Order Confirming Trust Assets is under submission.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: G. Bastain. Not reported.

Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Jan-19-2022 Continued To Feb-07-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Dec-20-2021 Continued To Jan-19-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Nov-15-2021 Continued To Dec-20-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Hanlen Chang, via ZOOM, for Marc Farris, Petitioner; Andrew Dosa, via ZOOM, for Deborah Bridge, Respondent; John Fallat, via courtcall, for Surety Hartford; Daniel Pautenis, via courtcall, in propia persona, interested party.

Mr. Dosa confirms his client's opposition to the petition as the special needs trust was created after decedent turned sixty-five years old and advises that this matter may be resolved and asks for a continuance to allow his client to confirm her position. Mr. Chan replies that Mr. Dosa has had plenty of time to confirm his client's position. Mr. Chan then offers oral testimony regarding his client's position. Mr. Pautenis reports that he opposes the petition and requests a continuance. The court advises the parties that the typical court practice when an opposition is made in open court is to continue the matter to allow for the filing of a formal objection.

After additional discussion, the Petition for Order Confirming Trust Assets is continued to Dec-20-2021 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. The parties are instructed to file objections by Dec-06-2021 and responses to any objections are to be filed by Dec-13-2021.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
